title: Scope runs with tags and --limit
description: Constrain which tasks and hosts a play touches using tags and inventory limits to shrink blast radius.
body: Use when you need to apply only part of a playbook or target a subset of hosts. Do not run the whole play against the whole inventory for a small change — that maximizes blast radius. Actions: tag tasks by concern, run with --tags to apply just the relevant ones, and use --limit to scope to specific hosts, verifying the host list before running. Validation signals include only the intended tasks and hosts appearing in the run summary. Risk boundary: an over-broad --limit pattern can still hit production — confirm the resolved host list and gate prod inventory on human approval.
